title: platydesma auriculifolium
intro: Platydesma auriculifolium is a plant species native to the tropical forests of the Pacific island of Fiji, belonging to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Platydesma auriculifolium include relief from fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential use in wound healing and skin care. The plant is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can also be made into a paste or used as a tincture for its medicinal properties.
